note: Image-generation prompts for every exercise form diagram. A style wrapper (flat vector, gray figure, charcoal ground, gold accents) is prepended at generation time. Regenerate any diagram by rerunning its prompt through fal-ai/nano-banana-pro at 1:1 / 1K.
styleWrapper: Clean instructional fitness form diagram in a flat vector illustration style: a gender-neutral athletic figure drawn in medium gray with smooth rounded limbs and no facial features, on a dark charcoal background. Golden-yellow accent arrows and guide lines mark the movement cues and alignment. Minimal, uncluttered, generous margins, centered composition, absolutely no text or labels or watermarks.

prompts.arm-swing-circles: Front-view illustration of a person standing tall with feet hip-width apart, both arms sweeping in large loose circles: right arm up and back overhead, left arm down and forward, shoulders relaxed away from the ears. Highlight the movement with two smooth curved golden arrows tracing wide circular paths around each shoulder, showing relaxed momentum rather than forced range.
prompts.arm-wave-reach: Front-view illustration of a figure with both arms sweeping fully overhead, knees softly bent mid-bounce. Draw large curved arrows tracing the arms' circular reach-and-wave path from hips to overhead and back, and highlight the tall spine and relaxed, un-shrugged shoulders with accent marks.
prompts.arnold-press: Two side-by-side panels, front view, of a person seated on a bench performing an Arnold press with two dumbbells. Left panel: dumbbells held at shoulder height in front of the chest with palms facing the body, elbows tucked in front. Right panel: arms fully extended overhead with palms facing forward, elbows out. Highlight the rotation with a smooth curved golden arrow tracing one dumbbell's spiraling path from the front-of-chest position up to overhead.
prompts.back-extension: Side-view illustration of a person on a back extension bench at the top of the movement: thighs anchored on the pad, feet locked under the rollers, torso raised until the body forms one straight line from head through hips to heels, arms crossed over the chest. Highlight a straight accent line along the entire body at the top, with a small stop mark at the low back showing the spine finishing straight and not arching past neutral.
prompts.barbell-back-squat: Front-view illustration of a person at the bottom of a barbell back squat: barbell resting across the upper back and shoulders, feet slightly wider than hip width, hips below parallel, chest upright, both knees tracking directly over the toes. Highlight two small outward accent arrows at the knees showing them pressing out in line with the toes, and an accent line grounding both heels flat on the floor.
prompts.barbell-bench-press: Side-view illustration of a person lying on a flat bench pressing a barbell, shown at the bottom of the rep with the bar just above the chest, elbows bent and tucked at roughly a forty-five degree angle to the torso, feet planted on the floor and a slight arch in the upper back. Highlight the elbow angle with a small accent arc showing the elbows staying tucked rather than flaring wide.
prompts.bear-crawl: Side-view illustration of a person in a bear crawl mid-step: on hands and toes with knees bent and hovering just an inch above the floor, back completely flat and parallel to the ground, opposite hand and foot advancing together. Highlight the flat tabletop back with a horizontal accent line from the shoulders to the hips, showing the hips staying level and low rather than piking upward.
prompts.bent-over-row: Side-view illustration of a person performing a bent-over barbell row: torso hinged forward to about 45 degrees and held rigid, knees softly bent, flat back, barbell pulled up to the lower ribs with elbows driving up and back past the torso. Highlight the elbow with an accent arrow tracing its path up and back toward the ceiling, and a straight accent line along the flat, motionless spine.
prompts.bicep-curl: Two side-by-side panels of a side-view illustration of a standing person holding a dumbbell in one hand: left panel shows the arm fully extended at the side, right panel shows the forearm curled up with the dumbbell near the shoulder while the upper arm stays vertical against the torso. Highlight the elbow with an accent dot and a short curved arrow showing the forearm rotating around a fixed elbow, and add a small vertical accent line along the upright torso to show no rocking.
prompts.bicycle-crunch: Three-quarter view illustration of a person lying on their back mid bicycle crunch: right knee drawn in toward the chest, left leg extended long and hovering above the floor, torso rotated so the left shoulder and elbow reach toward the right knee, fingertips lightly beside the head. Highlight the rotation with an accent arc from the left ribs toward the right knee, and a small accent mark at the head showing the neck stays relaxed and unpulled.
prompts.bird-dog: Side-view illustration of a person in a bird dog on hands and knees: left arm extended straight forward and right leg extended straight back, both level with the flat, table-like back, supporting hand under the shoulder and supporting knee under the hip. Highlight a single straight accent line running from the extended fingertips along the level spine to the extended heel, showing the low back held flat without arching.
prompts.bodyweight-squat: Side-view illustration of a person at the bottom of a bodyweight squat: feet shoulder-width apart and flat on the floor, hips lowered to just below knee height, knees bent, torso upright with arms extended straight forward at shoulder height for balance. Highlight the upright torso with a vertical accent line from shoulder to hip, and add a small arrow at the mid-foot showing weight staying centered rather than tipping forward.
prompts.box-jump: Two side-by-side panels of a side-view illustration of a person and a knee-height plyometric box: left panel shows the person mid-jump with arms swung back and hips loaded, right panel shows a soft quiet landing on top of the box with both knees bent, hips back, and the whole foot flat on the box surface. Highlight the bent-knee landing with a small downward accent arrow absorbing softly into the box, and a curved accent arrow beside the box showing stepping down rather than jumping down.
prompts.boxer-slip-and-roll: Front-facing three-frame illustration of a boxer in stance: frame one slipping the head left of center, frame two at the bottom of a shallow squat mid-roll, frame three finishing the U-path on the right side. Highlight the dotted U-shaped head path and arrows at the knees showing where the bend comes from.
prompts.broad-jump: Two side-by-side panels of a side-view illustration of a person performing a broad jump: left panel shows the loaded takeoff with hips hinged back, knees bent, and arms swung behind the body; right panel shows the stuck landing farther forward with both feet flat, knees bent softly over the toes, hips back, and arms forward for balance, body completely still. Highlight the landing with an accent line down through the bent knees and flat feet, showing a stable, fully absorbed stick.
prompts.bulgarian-split-squat: Side-view illustration of a person in the bottom of a Bulgarian split squat: front leg bent about ninety degrees with weight over the front heel, rear foot resting on a bench behind them, torso upright with a slight forward lean, a dumbbell held in each hand at the sides. Highlight a vertical accent line dropping from the shoulder through the front heel to show the weight stacked over the front leg.
prompts.burpee: Two side-by-side panels: left panel shows a side view of the person in the plank phase of a burpee, body in one rigid straight line from shoulders through hips to heels with hands on the floor; right panel shows the person jumping upright with arms extended overhead and legs straight. Highlight a straight accent line along the plank body in the left panel showing the hips held level, not sagging.
prompts.cable-crossover: Front-view illustration of a person standing between two cable machine towers performing a cable crossover: slight forward lean with a staggered stance, arms sweeping in a wide arc from high and out to the sides down to meet in front of the lower chest, each elbow holding a fixed slight bend, cables running up to high pulleys on both sides. Highlight a curved accent arc tracing one arm's hugging path, with a small accent mark at the elbow showing its angle staying constant.
prompts.cable-curl: Side-view illustration of a person standing facing a cable machine, curling a straight bar attached to the low pulley: elbows pinned tight against the sides of the torso, forearms curled up to mid-height, upper arms vertical, cable running taut down to the floor pulley. Highlight the elbow with an accent dot pinned to the side of the torso, and a short backward accent arrow showing the elbow must not drift forward.
prompts.cable-lateral-raise: Front-view illustration of a person standing beside a low cable machine, raising one straight-ish arm out to the side to shoulder height with the elbow leading slightly higher than the hand and a gentle bend in the elbow, the other hand resting on the machine for support. Shoulders stay pressed down away from the ears. Highlight the raising arm with an accent arc from the hip to shoulder height, and a small downward accent arrow at the trap showing no shrug.
prompts.calf-raise: Side-view illustration of a person performing a standing calf raise at the top position: body tall and straight, holding a dumbbell in one hand at the side, both heels lifted high off the floor with weight on the balls of the feet, ankles fully extended. Highlight the raised heel with an upward accent arrow and a small accent mark at the top of the ankle showing the paused, fully extended position.
prompts.cat-cow: Two side-by-side panels of a side-view illustration of a person on hands and knees: left panel shows the cat position with the spine rounded upward into a smooth arch and head dropped; right panel shows the cow position with the belly lowered, chest lifted, and spine dipped into a gentle downward curve with head raised. Highlight the mid-spine with a small accent arc and arrows showing the slow segmented curl between the two shapes.
prompts.chair-pose: Side-view illustration of a person in chair pose: knees bent, hips sitting back, torso leaning slightly forward with arms extended overhead in line with the ears. Highlight the weight over the heels with a downward accent arrow and the straight line from hands to hips.
prompts.chest-doorway-stretch: Front three-quarter view illustration of a person standing in a simple doorway frame: one forearm and palm resting against the door frame with the elbow bent at ninety degrees at shoulder height, body leaning gently forward through the opening so the chest opens, ribcage staying stacked over the pelvis. Highlight a gentle accent arrow at the front of the shoulder showing the chest opening forward, and a short vertical accent line at the ribcage showing the ribs staying down rather than flaring.
prompts.chest-supported-row: Side-view illustration of a person lying face-down on an incline bench, chest fully pressed into the pad, rowing a dumbbell in each hand: elbows drawn up and back past the ribs at the top of the pull, shoulder blades squeezed together, chest never leaving the pad. Highlight the shoulder blades with two converging accent arrows meeting at the mid-back, and a small accent mark showing the chest staying glued to the pad.
prompts.childs-pose: Side-view illustration of a person resting in child's pose on the floor: knees folded under the body, hips sitting back onto the heels, torso draped forward over the thighs, forehead near the floor, arms extended long in front with palms down, shoulders relaxed away from the ears. Highlight a gentle accent arrow at the hips sinking back and down toward the heels.
prompts.chin-up: Side-view illustration of a person at the top of a chin-up on a straight overhead bar, palms facing toward them: chin cleared above the bar, elbows driven down close to the ribs, shoulder blades pulled down and back, legs hanging straight and still. Highlight the elbows with a golden arrow driving down toward the ribs, and a small accent line along the straight, quiet legs to show no swinging.
prompts.close-grip-bench-press: Side-view illustration of a person lying on a flat bench pressing a barbell with a shoulder-width grip: the bar lowered to the lower chest, elbows bent and tucked close so the upper arms brush the sides of the torso, wrists stacked straight over the elbows, feet flat on the floor. Highlight the tucked elbow path with an accent arrow running along the ribcage, and a short accent line showing the straight wrist-over-elbow stacking.
prompts.cobra-pose: Side-view illustration of a person lying prone in cobra pose: chest lifted, elbows bent, hips and thighs pressed to the mat. Highlight the smooth even curve of the spine with an accent arc, and mark the hips staying in contact with the floor.
prompts.concentration-curl: Side-view illustration of a person seated on a flat bench, leaning slightly forward, with the right elbow braced against the inside of the right thigh, curling a dumbbell up toward the shoulder while the upper arm stays completely still, torso steady with the free hand resting on the other knee. Highlight the elbow brace point with a small accent anchor mark, and an accent arc showing only the forearm traveling through the curl.
prompts.conventional-deadlift: Two side-by-side panels, side view, of a person deadlifting a barbell. Left panel: setup position with the bar over the mid-foot, hips higher than knees, arms straight, shoulders over the bar, spine long and flat from head to tailbone. Right panel: standing tall at lockout, hips fully extended, bar at thigh height, shoulders back. Highlight the flat, neutral spine in the setup panel with a single golden accent line from head to tailbone.
prompts.crescent-lunge: Side-view illustration of a person in crescent lunge: long split stance, front knee at 90 degrees, back heel lifted, arms extended straight overhead. Highlight the rear hip flexor as the stretch target and add a small arrow showing the pelvis tucking under.
prompts.cross-body-shoulder-stretch: Front-view illustration of a standing person with one arm extended horizontally across the chest, opposite forearm hooked above the elbow pulling it inward. Highlight the rear deltoid of the stretched arm and add a small downward arrow at that shoulder showing it staying away from the ear.
prompts.dance-squat-groove: Front-view illustration of a figure in a half-squat with feet wider than shoulders and toes slightly out, arms bent and pumping. Add small vertical double-headed arrows at the hips showing the rhythmic pulse, highlight the knees tracking over the toes with accent lines, and shade the thighs as the working muscles.
prompts.dead-bug: Side-view illustration of a person lying on their back on the floor: right arm extended straight up toward the ceiling, left arm reaching back low toward the floor overhead, left knee bent at ninety degrees above the hip, and right leg extended long and hovering just above the floor. Highlight the lower back with an accent line showing it pressed flat against the floor, with a small downward arrow at the lumbar spine.
prompts.decline-push-up: Side-view illustration of a person at the bottom of a decline push-up: both feet elevated on a flat bench behind them, hands on the floor under the shoulders, elbows bent with the chest just above the floor, body in one rigid straight line angled downward from heels to head. Highlight the straight line from heels through hips to head with a golden accent line, with a small arrow under the hips pointing up to show hips held in line, not sagging.
prompts.diamond-push-up: Three-quarter view illustration of a person at the bottom of a diamond push-up: body in one rigid straight line, both hands placed together directly under the chest with thumbs and index fingers forming a diamond shape, elbows bent and tracking straight back so they brush the ribs. Highlight two small accent arrows at the elbows pointing back along the ribs, and an accent mark at the hands positioned under the chest, not out in front.
prompts.dip: Side-view illustration of a person supported on parallel bars at the bottom of a triceps dip: arms bent so the elbows sit at about ninety degrees pointing straight back, torso tall and nearly vertical, knees bent slightly with feet crossed behind. Highlight the shoulder-to-elbow angle with an accent arc showing the controlled ninety-degree depth, with a small arrow indicating the descent stops there rather than sinking deeper.
prompts.downward-dog: Side-view illustration of a person in downward dog: body forming a clear inverted V, arms and spine in one straight line, knees slightly bent, heels slightly lifted. Highlight the straight line from hands through hips with an accent line, and add a small arrow showing hips lifting up and back.
prompts.dumbbell-bench-press: Side-view illustration of a person lying flat on a bench pressing two dumbbells: back on the bench, feet planted on the floor, dumbbells held at the bottom position just above the chest with forearms vertical and elbows tucked at roughly 45 degrees from the torso. Highlight a straight accent line running from each dumbbell down through the vertical forearm to the elbow, showing the forearm stacked directly under the weight.
prompts.dumbbell-chest-fly: Front-view illustration from slightly above of a person lying on a flat bench performing a dumbbell chest fly: arms opened wide out to the sides in a broad hugging arc, elbows softly bent at a fixed angle, dumbbells level with the chest, feet flat on the floor. Highlight the wide hugging arc with a curved golden accent line tracing the path of the dumbbells from out wide up over the chest.
prompts.dumbbell-row: Side-view illustration of a person performing a one-arm dumbbell row: left knee and left hand braced on a flat bench, back flat and parallel to the floor, right arm pulling a dumbbell up with the elbow driving back past the ribs, shoulder blade drawn down and back. Highlight the pulling elbow with a golden arrow sweeping up and back toward the hip, and a short accent line along the flat, level spine.
prompts.dumbbell-shrug: Front-view illustration of a standing person holding a dumbbell in each hand at the sides with straight arms, shoulders lifted straight up toward the ears at the top of a shrug, torso tall and still. Highlight a straight vertical accent arrow beside each shoulder showing pure up-and-down travel, with no circular rolling path.
prompts.dumbbell-snatch: Side-view three-panel illustration of a dumbbell snatch: panel 1 flat-back hinge gripping the dumbbell, panel 2 full hip extension with the bell traveling close to the torso, panel 3 standing with one arm locked out overhead. Draw the bell path as a straight vertical dotted line close to the body.
prompts.dumbbell-thruster: Side-view two-panel illustration of a dumbbell thruster: panel 1 shows a below-parallel squat with dumbbells racked at the shoulders, panel 2 shows full standing extension with both dumbbells locked out overhead. Add an upward motion arrow from heels through hands to show the power transfer.
prompts.face-pull: Side-view illustration of a person standing upright pulling a rope attachment from a cable machine set at face height: elbows high and wide, hands pulled back beside the ears so both forearms point upward like a double-arm flex, shoulders down away from the ears. Highlight the shoulders with a small downward accent arrow showing them staying low, and an accent arc showing the rope ends pulling apart toward the ears.
prompts.farmer-carry: Front-view illustration of a person walking forward carrying a heavy dumbbell in each hand at the sides: shoulders level and pulled down away from the ears, spine tall and vertical, arms straight, one foot mid-stride. Highlight the perfectly level line across both shoulders with a horizontal accent line, and a vertical accent line down the centered spine showing no lean to either side.
prompts.figure-four-stretch: Side-view illustration of a person lying on their back with one ankle crossed over the opposite knee forming a 4, hands clasped behind the supporting thigh pulling it toward the chest. Highlight the crossed leg's glute as the stretch target and keep the head resting on the mat.
prompts.front-kick-step: Side-view illustration of a figure mid front-kick: standing leg slightly bent, kicking leg extended forward at hip height with knee shown leading in a ghosted intermediate position, fists guarding at chest. Draw an arced arrow tracing the kick path and highlight the upright torso with a vertical accent line.
prompts.front-raise: Side-view illustration of a person performing a dumbbell front raise: standing tall and completely still, a dumbbell in each hand, one arm raised straight forward to exactly shoulder height with a soft elbow, the other arm resting at the thigh. Highlight a vertical accent line along the upright, motionless torso and a small arrow tracing the arm's arc up to shoulder height and no higher.
prompts.front-squat: Side-view illustration of a person at the bottom of a barbell front squat inside a simple squat rack: barbell resting across the front of the shoulders, fingertips under the bar, elbows lifted high so the upper arms are parallel to the floor, torso upright, hips below knee level. Highlight the raised elbows with a golden arrow pointing up and forward, plus a short vertical accent line along the upright torso.
prompts.glute-bridge: Side-view illustration of a person lying on their back on the floor at the top of a hip bridge: knees bent, feet flat, hips lifted so torso and thighs form one straight line from shoulders to knees. Highlight that straight shoulder-to-knee line with an accent line, and add a small arrow at the ribcage angling down to show the ribs tucking rather than the low back overarching.
prompts.goblet-squat: Front-view illustration of a person at the bottom of a goblet squat, holding a single dumbbell vertically with both hands against the upper chest, elbows tucked inside the knees. Feet shoulder-width apart, hips below knee level, torso upright with chest tall, both knees tracking outward over the toes. Highlight each knee with a small golden arrow pointing outward over the toes to show knees pushed out, not collapsing inward.
prompts.grapevine-step: Front-view four-stage footwork sequence of a grapevine step: figure stepping right, left foot crossing behind, right foot stepping out again, feet closing with a tap. Number the stages 1-4, draw dashed footprint paths along the floor showing the sideways travel, and add a direction arrow indicating the lateral movement.
prompts.hammer-curl: Side-view illustration of a person standing tall holding dumbbells with a neutral grip, palms facing the body: one arm curled up so the dumbbell is near the shoulder with the thumb pointing up, the other arm hanging straight down, both elbows pinned tight against the sides of the torso. Highlight the working elbow with a small accent anchor mark showing it stays fixed at the side, and a straight accent line down the torso showing no body swing.
prompts.hamstring-curl: Side-view illustration of a person lying face down on a leg curl machine, hips pressed flat against the pad, knees bent so the lower legs curl up toward the rear hip with the ankle roller at the top of the movement. Highlight a curved accent arrow tracing the heels arcing toward the hip, and a small downward accent arrow at the hips showing them staying pinned to the pad.
prompts.hanging-knee-raise: Side-view illustration of a person hanging from a pull-up bar with straight arms, knees raised up toward the chest and the pelvis curled up and under so the lower spine rounds slightly, body still with no swing. Highlight a curved accent arrow at the pelvis showing it tilting up toward the ribs, and a vertical accent line through the hanging torso to show zero swinging.
prompts.heavy-bag-rounds: Three-quarter view illustration of an athlete in gloves striking a hanging heavy bag with a rear-hand cross: hip rotated through, back heel pivoted, opposite hand guarding the chin. Highlight the straight wrist alignment from knuckle to elbow and a foot-path arrow showing circling around the bag.
prompts.high-knees: Side-view illustration of a person running in place doing high knees: torso tall and upright, one knee driven up to hip height with that thigh parallel to the floor, the other foot on the ball of the foot, arms bent and pumping in opposition. Highlight a vertical accent line along the tall upright torso, and a small upward arrow at the raised knee showing it driving to hip height.
prompts.hip-flexor-stretch: Side-view illustration of a person in a tall half-kneeling hip flexor stretch: left knee on the floor with the left leg trailing behind, right foot planted in front with the right knee bent at 90 degrees, torso perfectly upright, pelvis tucked slightly under. Highlight the front of the rear hip with a golden accent arrow curving under the pelvis to show the pelvic tuck creating the stretch, and a short vertical accent line along the tall, unarched torso.
prompts.hip-thrust: Side-view illustration of a person at the top of a barbell hip thrust: upper back resting on a flat bench, feet planted flat on the floor with knees bent at 90 degrees, hips fully extended so the body forms a straight level line from shoulders to knees, a padded barbell resting across the hip crease, chin tucked toward the chest and ribs down. Highlight the straight line from shoulders through hips to knees with a golden accent line, and a small arrow at the hips pointing up to show the lift finishing at the hips, not the lower back arching.
prompts.hollow-hold: Side-view illustration of a person lying on their back in a hollow hold: low back pressed flat into the floor, shoulder blades and head curled slightly off the ground, arms extended overhead by the ears, both legs straight and hovering together well above the floor. Highlight an accent line showing the low back sealed flat against the floor, and a small upward accent arrow under the legs showing them held high enough to keep the back from arching.
prompts.incline-dumbbell-press: Side-view illustration of a person lying back on an incline bench pressing two dumbbells: shown mid-press with the dumbbells traveling up and slightly inward above the upper chest, elbows bent below the wrists and angled about forty-five degrees from the torso, feet planted on the floor. Highlight two converging accent arrows tracing the up-and-inward press path of the dumbbells, like the two sides of the letter A.
prompts.incline-push-up: Side-view illustration of a person performing an incline push-up with hands on a simple flat bench, body in a straight diagonal line from head to heels, arms bent at the bottom of the rep with chest near the bench edge. Highlight the straight rigid line from shoulders through hips to heels with an accent line, and add a small arrow under the hips showing they must not sag toward the floor.
prompts.inverted-row: Side-view illustration of a person hanging beneath a horizontal bar in an inverted row at the top position: body in one rigid straight line from shoulders to heels, chest pulled up to the bar, elbows bent and drawn back, heels on the floor. Highlight the shoulder blades with a small accent arrow showing them squeezing together, and an accent line along the straight hip line to show no sagging.
prompts.jab-cross-combo: Side-angle illustration of an athlete in a boxing stance mid jab-cross combination: lead arm fully extended on the jab in frame one, rear arm extended with hip rotated and back heel raised on the cross in frame two. Highlight the rotation arrow through the rear hip and the returning hand path to the chin.
prompts.jump-rope: Side-view illustration of a person mid jump-rope bounce: body tall and upright, elbows tucked close to the ribs, wrists turning the rope with the handles low at the hips, feet only a few centimeters off the floor with knees soft, the rope drawn as a simple arc passing under the feet. Highlight a small vertical accent arrow under the feet showing the low quiet bounce height.
prompts.jump-squat: Side-view illustration of a person landing from a jump squat: absorbing the landing in a half-squat with hips back, both knees bent and tracking over the toes, torso slightly forward, arms swept back, landing softly on the mid-foot. Highlight the bent knees with a golden arrow pointing down through the hips to show sinking softly into the landing rather than landing stiff-legged.
prompts.jumping-jack: Front-view illustration of a person at the open position of a jumping jack: feet spread wide apart, both arms fully raised overhead in a wide V, body tall and light on the balls of the feet, knees soft. Highlight the feet with two small golden arrows pointing down onto the forefeet to show a light, springy landing, and a curved accent line tracing the arms' arc overhead.
prompts.kettlebell-goblet-clean: Side-view two-panel illustration: panel 1 shows a flat-back hinge with a kettlebell hiked between the legs, panel 2 shows standing tall with the bell caught in a goblet position at the chest, elbows tucked. Draw the bell's arc as a curved dotted line and highlight the hip-snap with an arrow.
prompts.kettlebell-halo: Front-view illustration of an athlete holding an inverted kettlebell by the horns at chest height, with a dotted circular path showing the bell's orbit around the head. Highlight braced core and level hips with callout labels.
prompts.kettlebell-swing: Side-view illustration of a person at the top of a kettlebell swing: standing fully upright with hips locked out, knees straight but soft, arms relaxed and straight with the kettlebell floating at chest height, shoulders down. Highlight the hips with a golden arrow driving forward through the pelvis to show the hip snap powering the swing, and a small curved accent line tracing the kettlebell's arc from between the legs up to chest height.
prompts.kettlebell-turkish-get-up: Storyboard illustration with five sequential side-view frames of a Turkish get-up: lying press-up, roll to elbow, tall-hand hip bridge, kneeling lunge, standing lockout. Kettlebell held overhead in every frame with a vertical alignment line through wrist, elbow and shoulder.
prompts.lat-pulldown: Front-view illustration of a person seated at a cable lat pulldown machine, thighs secured under the pad, gripping a wide bar overhead with both hands. Torso is tall and nearly vertical with only a slight backward lean, and the bar is drawn down to upper-chest height with elbows pointing down and slightly out. Highlight both elbows with accent arrows pointing straight down toward the hips, showing the elbows-to-pockets pulling path.
prompts.lateral-raise: Front-view illustration of a standing person at the top of a lateral raise: a dumbbell in each hand, both arms lifted straight out to the sides to shoulder height with a soft bend in the elbows, elbows slightly higher than the wrists, torso tall and still. Highlight each elbow with a small upward accent arrow showing the elbows leading the lift, and a vertical accent line through the torso to show no swinging.
prompts.lateral-shuffle: Front-view illustration of a person mid lateral shuffle moving to their right: knees bent in an athletic half-squat, hips low and level, feet wide apart with the right foot reaching sideways and the left foot pushing off, arms bent and ready in front of the torso, chest up. Highlight the low hip line with a horizontal golden accent line at hip height, and a golden arrow pointing sideways in the direction of travel to show staying low while moving, feet never crossing.
prompts.leg-extension: Side-view illustration of a person seated in a leg extension machine, back against the pad, hands gripping the side handles, both legs extended straight out so the shins press the roller pad level with the knees. Highlight the fully straightened knees with an accent arc at the top of the movement, showing a slow controlled squeeze rather than a swinging motion.
prompts.leg-press: Side-view illustration of a person seated in a leg press machine, back and hips fully against the angled pad, both feet flat on the platform with knees bent to about ninety degrees at the bottom of the rep. Hands grip the side handles. Highlight the hips and lower back with an accent line showing them staying pressed into the pad, with a small arrow indicating the hips do not curl off the seat as the knees come down.
prompts.leg-pull-front: Side-view illustration of a figure in a straight-arm plank with one leg raised behind and above hip height, foot pointed. Highlight the unbroken head-to-heel line of the plank with an accent line, add an upward arrow at the raised foot, and mark the level hips with a small horizontal accent bar.
prompts.machine-chest-press: Three-quarter view illustration of a person seated in a chest press machine: back and head against the pad, both hands gripping the handles at mid-chest height, arms extending through a full-length press with elbows almost straight at the end of the rep. Highlight two outward accent arrows at the hands showing the intent to push the handles apart as well as forward, and a small accent arc showing the full range from chest to full extension.
prompts.medicine-ball-rotational-throw: Overhead-and-side two-frame illustration of an athlete side-on to a wall: frame one coiled with a medicine ball at the rear hip, hips rotated away; frame two at release with hips fully rotated toward the wall, back heel pivoted, arms extended. Highlight the rotation arrow from rear hip through the torso and the pivoting back foot.
prompts.mountain-climber: Side-view illustration of a person in a high plank driving one knee forward: hands under shoulders, arms straight, one knee tucked toward the chest while the other leg is extended straight back, hips level at shoulder height like a plank. Highlight a horizontal accent line from shoulders to the heel of the extended leg showing the hips staying level, and a small forward accent arrow on the driving knee.
prompts.overhead-cable-extension: Side-view illustration of a person facing away from a cable machine, leaning slightly forward in a staggered stance, holding a rope attachment overhead with both hands: upper arms fixed beside the ears pointing forward and up, elbows extending from bent to straight as the hands press forward. Highlight the stationary upper arm with a golden accent line, and a small arrow at the elbow pointing inward to show the elbows kept narrow, not flaring wide.
prompts.overhead-press: Side-view illustration of a person standing and pressing a barbell overhead to full lockout: arms straight, bar stacked directly over the shoulders and mid-foot, hips fully extended with the rear hip muscles squeezed, ribs down and spine neutral. Highlight the vertical accent line running from the bar through the shoulder, hip, and ankle, showing no backward lean or lower-back arch.
prompts.overhead-tricep-extension: Side-view illustration of a person standing tall holding one dumbbell overhead with both hands, elbows bent so the dumbbell hangs behind the head, upper arms vertical beside the ears with elbows pointing straight up and kept narrow. Ribs down, spine tall. Highlight the fixed upper-arm position with a golden accent line along the vertical upper arm, and a small arrow at the elbow pointing inward to show elbows staying close, not flaring.
prompts.pallof-press: Front-angle illustration of an athlete standing side-on to a cable stack, arms extended straight ahead holding the handle at sternum height, cable pulling laterally. Highlight the taut cable's sideways pull with an arrow and a contrasting straight arrow showing the press path, with the square hips and stacked ribcage emphasized.
prompts.pigeon-pose: Three-quarter view illustration of a person in pigeon pose: front shin folded on the mat, rear leg extended straight back, torso upright. Highlight level, squared hips with a horizontal accent line and add a small accent marker on the outer hip of the front leg to show where the stretch is felt.
prompts.pike-push-up: Side-view illustration of a person at the bottom of a pike push-up: body folded into a sharp inverted V with hips high in the air, legs straight, hands on the floor shoulder-width apart, elbows bent so the top of the head hovers just above the floor between the hands, heels slightly lifted. Highlight the inverted V with an accent line from hands up to the hips, plus a small upward arrow at the hips showing them staying lifted rather than flattening.
prompts.pilates-hundred: Side-view illustration of a person lying on a mat in the Pilates hundred: head and shoulder blades curled off the floor, legs extended at 45 degrees, straight arms hovering by the hips. Highlight the low back pressed flat to the mat with an accent line and add small double-headed arrows at the hands showing the rapid up-down pumping motion.
prompts.plank: Side-view illustration of a person holding a forearm plank on the floor: elbows stacked directly under the shoulders, body in one rigid straight line from head through hips to heels, toes tucked. Highlight the straight line from shoulders through hips to ankles with a single golden accent line, with a small arrow under the hips pointing up to show hips held level, not sagging.
prompts.preacher-curl: Side-view illustration of a person seated at a preacher bench curling a short barbell: chest against the angled pad, the backs of both upper arms flat on the pad, forearms midway through the curl. Highlight the back of the upper arm with an accent line where it contacts the pad, and a slow controlled downward accent arrow along the lowering path of the bar.
prompts.pull-up: Two side-by-side panels of a side-view illustration of a person on a pull-up bar: left panel shows a dead hang with arms fully straight and body in one vertical line; right panel shows the top position with chin above the bar, elbows driven down beside the ribs, body still vertical with no swing. Highlight the elbows with accent arrows pulling down toward the ribs, and add a straight accent line along the body showing no kipping arch.
prompts.pull-up-negative: Side-view three-frame sequence of an athlete at a pull-up bar: chin over the bar at the top, halfway down with elbows at 90 degrees, and a full dead hang at the bottom. Add a downward arrow with a clock icon indicating a slow 4–5 second descent.
prompts.push-up: Side-view illustration of a person at the bottom of a push-up on the floor: body in one rigid straight line from head through hips to heels, hands under the shoulders, elbows bent and tucked at about 45 degrees from the torso, chest hovering just above the floor. Highlight the straight accent line from shoulders through hips to ankles, with a small upward arrow under the hips showing them held level and not sagging.
prompts.rear-delt-fly: Three-quarter view illustration of a person performing a rear delt fly: hinged forward at the hips with a flat back, torso near parallel to the floor, a dumbbell in each hand, arms slightly bent and raised out wide to the sides level with the shoulders. Highlight two small accent arrows at the shoulder blades pinching toward the spine at the top of the movement.
prompts.reverse-lunge: Side-view illustration of a person at the bottom of a reverse lunge: torso tall and vertical, front knee bent to 90 degrees with the shin vertical and knee stacked over the ankle, rear leg stepped far back with the rear knee hovering just above the floor and rear heel lifted. Highlight a vertical accent line from the front knee straight down through the ankle, and a small arrow showing the rear foot stepping back long.
prompts.roll-up: Side-view three-stage sequence of a roll-up: figure lying flat with arms overhead, figure halfway up in a rounded C-curve with arms reaching forward, figure folded over extended legs. Draw a curved accent arrow tracing the spine's rolling path and highlight the rounded lower back at the midpoint.
prompts.romanian-deadlift: Side-view illustration of a person performing a Romanian deadlift with a barbell: hips pushed far back, torso hinged forward to about 45 degrees, knees only slightly bent, back flat and long, barbell hanging close against the thighs just below the knees. Highlight the flat straight line of the spine from head to hip with an accent line, and add a small arrow at the hips pointing backward to show the hips traveling back rather than dropping into a squat.
prompts.rowing-machine: Two side-by-side panels of a side-view illustration of a person on a rowing machine: left panel shows the catch with knees deeply bent, arms straight holding the handle, torso hinged slightly forward; right panel shows the finish with legs fully extended, torso leaning slightly back, and the handle pulled to the lower ribs with bent elbows. Highlight the sequence with a sweeping accent arrow from the legs to the torso to the arms, showing legs drive first before the arms pull.
prompts.russian-twist: Three-quarter view illustration of a person seated on the floor performing a Russian twist: knees bent, heels lightly touching the floor, torso leaned back to about 45 degrees with a long straight spine, holding a single weight with both hands rotated to one side of the hips. Highlight a curved accent arrow across the ribcage showing the whole torso rotating, and a straight accent line along the tall, unrounded back.
prompts.sandbag-to-shoulder: Three-panel side-view illustration of sandbag to shoulder: panel 1 flat-back hinge gripping the bag on the floor, panel 2 bag hugged in the lap with a quarter squat, panel 3 standing tall with the bag resting on one shoulder. Highlight the neutral spine in panel 1 and the hip-extension arrow in panel 3.
prompts.scapular-pull-up: Side-view illustration of an athlete hanging from a pull-up bar with straight arms, shown in two positions: relaxed dead hang and shoulder blades depressed with chest slightly lifted. Highlight the shoulder blades with directional arrows pointing down and back; keep elbows visibly locked in both frames.
prompts.seated-cable-row: Side-view illustration of a person seated at a cable row machine, feet braced on the footplate, knees slightly bent, torso vertical and still, both hands gripping the handle pulled in to the lower ribs with elbows driving straight back. Highlight the elbows with a golden arrow pulling back past the torso, and a short vertical accent line along the upright, unmoving torso.
prompts.seated-dumbbell-press: Side-view illustration of a person seated on an upright bench pressing two dumbbells straight overhead: arms fully extended with the dumbbells stacked directly over the shoulders and hips, ribcage drawn down, lower back in gentle neutral contact with the pad, feet flat on the floor. Highlight the vertical stacking with a straight golden accent line running from the dumbbell down through the shoulder and hip, and a small arrow at the ribs pointing down to show ribs tucked, no arching.
prompts.shadow-boxing: Three-quarter view illustration of a person shadow boxing in a boxer's stance: knees softly bent, left foot forward, right arm extended in a straight punch at chin height, left fist held high guarding the chin, elbows in, torso rotated slightly into the punch, weight on the balls of the feet. Highlight the extended punching arm with a golden arrow snapping straight back toward the chin to show the fast return, and a small accent mark at the raised guard fist.
prompts.shoulder-bridge: Side-view illustration of a shoulder bridge at the top position: shoulders and feet grounded, hips lifted so the torso and thighs form one straight line. Highlight the straight shoulder-to-knee line with an accent line, add a curved arrow at the pelvis showing the rolling lift, and shade the glutes as the working muscles.
prompts.shoulder-press: Two side-by-side panels of a side-view illustration of a person standing and pressing dumbbells: left panel shows dumbbells held at shoulder height with elbows bent and forearms vertical, ribs tucked down and spine neutral; right panel shows both arms fully locked out overhead with the upper arms beside the ears. Highlight the neutral lower back with a straight accent line along the spine, showing no arch as the weights go up.
prompts.side-kick-series: Side-lying figure viewed from the front-top angle: body in one straight line, bottom leg grounded, top leg raised to hip height. Draw dashed arc arrows showing the leg sweeping forward and backward, and highlight the stacked, motionless hips and long waistline with accent lines.
prompts.side-plank: Front-view illustration of a person holding a side plank: right forearm on the floor with the elbow directly under the shoulder, body in one straight rigid line from head through hips to stacked feet, left arm resting along the top hip. Highlight the straight line from shoulder through hip to ankles with a golden accent line, and add a small arrow at the hip pointing upward to show the hip lifted high, not sagging.
prompts.side-step-punch: Front-view illustration of a figure stepping to the right while the left fist punches across the body, right fist guarding at the chin. Draw a horizontal arrow at the feet showing the side step, an arced arrow at the punching arm crossing the midline, and a small rotation arrow at the waist showing the hips driving the punch.
prompts.single-leg-circle: Three-quarter view illustration of a person on their back with one leg vertical, drawing a circle in the air: dashed circular path traced at the raised foot with a direction arrow. Highlight the level, anchored pelvis with an accent line across the hip bones and show the other leg long on the mat.
prompts.single-leg-glute-bridge: Side-view illustration of a person lying on their back performing a single-leg hip bridge: right foot planted flat on the floor with the knee bent, hips lifted so the body forms a straight line from the right knee through the hips to the shoulders, left leg extended straight in line with the torso, arms flat on the floor. Highlight the straight line from knee through hip to shoulder with a golden accent line, and add a small arrow under the raised hip pointing up to show both hips lifted level.
prompts.single-leg-rdl: Side-view illustration of a person balancing on one slightly bent leg in a single-leg Romanian deadlift: torso hinged forward until nearly parallel to the floor, the free leg extended straight behind so it forms one continuous line with the flat back, one dumbbell hanging from the hand on the standing-leg side, hips staying square to the floor. Highlight the single straight accent line from the head along the flat back through the raised rear heel, and a small arrow at the pelvis showing the hips staying level and square.
prompts.sit-up: Side-view illustration of a person mid sit-up on the floor: knees bent with feet flat, torso curled halfway up with the spine in a smooth rounded curve peeling off the floor one segment at a time, arms crossed over the chest. Highlight the curling motion with an accent arc following the rounded spine, and a small accent mark at the neck showing the head stays neutral with no pulling.
prompts.skater-jump: Front-view illustration of a person landing a lateral skater jump on one leg: landing leg bent with the knee tracking directly over the foot, the trailing leg swept behind the body, arms out for balance, torso leaning slightly toward the landing side. Highlight a vertical accent line from the landing knee straight down over the mid-foot, with a small arrow showing the knee pressing outward rather than collapsing inward.
prompts.skullcrusher: Side-view illustration of a person lying on a flat bench performing a skullcrusher with an EZ bar: upper arms held perfectly vertical and motionless, elbows bent so the bar lowers toward the forehead, feet flat on the floor. Highlight a vertical accent line along the stationary upper arm from shoulder to elbow, with a small curved arrow at the forearm showing the bar hinging down from the elbow only.
prompts.spine-twist: Top-down and rear-view combined illustration of a seated figure with legs extended and arms out in a T: torso rotated to one side. Draw a horizontal rotation arrow around the ribcage, highlight the square, anchored hips with an accent line, and add a small vertical arrow at the head showing the lift through the crown.
prompts.split-step-hop: Front-angle illustration of an athlete in a low ready stance shown in two frames: frame one mid-hop an inch off the ground with feet under hips, frame two landing wider with knees bent and one leg beginning to drive laterally. Highlight the bent-knee loaded landing position and a direction arrow off the pushing leg.
prompts.sprint-interval: Side-view illustration of a person mid-sprint stride: tall forward-leaning posture, front knee driven high with the thigh near parallel to the ground, rear leg extended powerfully behind, arms bent at 90 degrees pumping in opposition, running on a simple treadmill belt. Highlight an upward accent arrow at the driving front knee and a straight accent line along the tall torso from head to rear hip.
prompts.standing-hamstring-stretch: Side-view illustration of a person standing with one heel propped forward on the floor, that leg straight, hinging forward from the hips with a long flat back and chest reaching toward the toes, hands resting lightly on the front thigh, rear knee slightly bent. Highlight the flat back with a straight accent line from the head to the rear hip, and a small arrow at the hips showing them folding back rather than the spine rounding.
prompts.standing-quad-stretch: Side-view illustration of a person standing on one leg, other heel pulled to the glute by the same-side hand, opposite hand resting on a wall. Highlight the stretched front of the bent-leg thigh and show both knees aligned side by side.
prompts.stationary-bike: Side-view illustration of a person pedaling a simple stationary bike: seat set high enough that the extended-down leg keeps a slight knee bend at the bottom of the pedal stroke, torso relaxed with a gentle forward lean, hands resting lightly on the handlebars with loose shoulders. Highlight a circular accent arrow around the pedals showing smooth even circles, and a small accent mark at the slightly bent bottom knee showing correct seat height.
prompts.step-touch: Front-view two-stage illustration of a step touch: figure stepping to the right with weight shifted onto the right leg and left toes tapping in beside it, then mirrored to the left. Draw a horizontal double-headed arrow under the feet showing the side-to-side rhythm and small motion arcs at the swinging arms.
prompts.step-up: Side-view illustration of a person stepping up onto a knee-high box: right foot planted fully on top of the box with the right knee bent, left leg trailing behind with only the toes touching the floor, torso leaning slightly forward from the hips. Highlight the top leg with a golden arrow curving up through the right thigh and hip to show that leg driving the lift, not the back foot pushing off.
prompts.straight-arm-pulldown: Side-view illustration of a person standing at a cable machine hinged slightly forward at the hips, both arms long and nearly straight gripping a bar attached to the high pulley, sweeping the bar in an arc from shoulder height down to the front of the thighs. Highlight a curved accent arrow tracing the bar's arc from high to the thighs, and a straight accent line along one arm showing the elbows staying long and only softly bent.
prompts.sumo-deadlift: Front-view illustration of a person in the starting position of a sumo deadlift: very wide stance with toes turned out, knees bent and tracking directly over the toes, arms hanging straight down inside the knees gripping a barbell, torso upright with a flat back and chest tall. Highlight both knees with outward accent arrows showing them pushed out over the toes, and a short accent line along the flat spine.
prompts.supine-twist: Top-down illustration of a person lying supine in a twist: one knee crossed over the body toward the floor, opposite arm extended at shoulder height, head turned toward the extended arm. Highlight both shoulders in contact with the mat and a gentle rotation arc along the spine.
prompts.swimming-exercise: Side-view illustration of a prone figure in the Pilates swimming exercise: chest and thighs lifted slightly off the mat, right arm and left leg raised higher than their pairs. Add small alternating up-down arrows at the hands and feet, and highlight the long line from fingertips to toes with an accent stroke.
prompts.teaser-prep: Side-view illustration of a person balancing in teaser prep: torso leaned back at roughly 45 degrees, shins parallel to the floor, arms reaching forward parallel to the shins. Highlight the V-angle between torso and thighs with an accent arc and mark the balance point at the back of the pelvis with a small accent dot.
prompts.thread-the-needle: Three-quarter view illustration of a person in thread the needle on hands and knees: hips stacked squarely over the knees, right arm threaded underneath the body with the right shoulder and side of the head resting on the floor, left hand planted, upper back rotated toward the floor. Highlight a curved accent arrow at the upper back showing the rotation coming from the mid-spine while the hips stay square and still.
prompts.treadmill-walk: Side-view illustration of a person walking briskly on a simple treadmill: tall upright posture, one leg striding forward with heel contacting the belt, the opposite arm swinging forward naturally, hands free and away from the rails. Highlight the natural arm swing with a small accent arrow, and add a vertical accent line through the ear, shoulder, and hip showing tall hands-free posture.
prompts.tricep-pushdown: Side-view illustration of a person standing at a cable machine performing a tricep pushdown: tall upright posture, shoulders pulled back and down, upper arms pinned vertically against the ribs, elbows bent as the hands grip the cable attachment at chest height, cable running up to a high pulley. Highlight the pinned elbow with an accent dot and a short arrow showing only the forearms extending down to full lockout.
prompts.v-up: Side-view illustration of a person at the top of a V-up on the floor: balancing on the tailbone with the body folded into a sharp V, legs straight and raised to about 45 degrees, torso raised to match, arms reaching straight toward the toes, chin neutral and neck long. Highlight an accent line from the fingertips to the toes at the point where they meet, and a small accent mark at the neutral, unstrained neck.
prompts.walking-lunge: Side-view illustration of a person mid walking lunge holding a dumbbell in each hand at the sides: front knee bent to about 90 degrees stacked over the ankle, rear knee hovering just above the floor, torso tall and vertical, gaze forward. Highlight the tall torso with a vertical golden accent line from head through hips, and add a small downward arrow at the rear knee showing a soft, controlled descent.
prompts.wall-ball-shot: Side-view illustration of an athlete mid wall-ball rep: bottom frame shows a below-parallel squat holding a medicine ball at the chest, top frame shows full hip extension throwing the ball to a target line 9 feet up a wall. Highlight the ball path as a vertical arrow and the hip drive with a motion arc.
prompts.wall-handstand-hold: Side-view illustration of an athlete holding a handstand with heels against a wall: straight line from wrists through shoulders, hips and heels. Highlight the stacked alignment with a vertical guide line, an arrow at the shoulders pointing upward for the push-tall cue, and a small marker showing hands placed a hand-length from the wall.
prompts.wall-sit: Side-view illustration of a person holding a wall sit: entire back pressed flat against a vertical wall, hips and knees both bent at ninety degrees so the thighs are parallel to the floor, feet flat and shins vertical, arms hanging relaxed at the sides away from the legs. Highlight the full back-to-wall contact with a vertical accent line along the spine and wall, and a small accent mark showing the hands staying off the thighs.
prompts.warrior-three: Side-view illustration of a person in warrior three: balancing on one slightly bent leg, torso and rear leg horizontal, arms extended forward. Highlight the single straight line from fingertips through the back heel with an accent line, and mark both hip points level with the floor.
prompts.warrior-two: Front-side view illustration of a person in warrior two: wide stance, front knee bent to 90 degrees over the ankle, back leg straight, arms extended horizontally in opposite directions. Highlight the front knee tracking over the foot and a vertical accent line through the upright torso.
prompts.worlds-greatest-stretch: Three-quarter view illustration of a person in the deep lunge position of the world's greatest stretch: front foot planted flat with the knee bent, back leg extended long and straight behind, one hand planted on the floor inside the front foot while the other arm reaches up toward the ceiling with the chest rotated open. Highlight the rotating reach with a curved accent arrow from the planted hand up through the raised hand, and an accent line along the long extended back leg to show staying long instead of collapsing.
